subject: large dark spiky-maned wolf creature charging through misty forest, glowing eyes, small figures visible far in background
description: A massive wolf-like creature with dark fur and an enormous spiky or bristling mane charges directly toward the viewer, mouth open to show large fangs. Its eyes glow with a faint red light. The creature is low to the ground, muscles bunched for the lunge. Far in the misty background to the left, a small campfire glows and a tiny humanoid figure can be faintly made out — an implied victim or prey. The forest around is dark, misty, and unwelcoming.
foreground: large dark spiky-maned wolf creature, mouth open, charging
background: misty dark forest, distant campfire glow
